extDescription.message: Show original-language text after page translation when you click or select translated content.

popupDescription.message: Enable the feature first, then preprocess the current page before using browser translation.

popupErrorUnsupportedPage.message: This page is not supported. Please open an HTTP/HTTPS page.

popupErrorNoActiveTab.message: Unable to get the active tab.

popupErrorPreprocessNoAck.message: Content script did not acknowledge preprocess.

popupErrorToggleNoAck.message: Page did not confirm feature switch update.

popupStatusPreprocessDone.message: Preprocess complete. You can now translate the page.
